mapper.select:
u.id, s.CompanyID as companyID, s.id as stationID, u.UnitSqe as subID, s.CompanyName as companyName, s.Name as stationName, rtu.stationCode as stationCode, u.unitNumber as unitName, u.UpdateDesc as mem FROM heatexchangerunit AS u LEFT JOIN heatexchangestation AS s ON u.StationID = s.id INNER JOIN rtustation AS rtu ON rtu.stationID = s.id INNER JOIN company AS c ON c.id = s.CompanyID
u.`id`=#{id}
